snippets.description: Nullable additive color column on crmUsers
snippets.content:
// manager-editable display color (hex); null falls back to avatarColor(name) hash (GitHub #275)
color: text('color'),

snippets.description: Hand-written additive migration (drizzle-kit generate blocked by pre-existing snapshot-chain drift, same class as migration 0033/#277)
Self-branch: rep cannot set own color, mirrors role/active rejection
Other-branch: setting another user's color requires manager/super_manager (mirrors rename gate)
snippets.content:
if (color !== undefined && !isManagerRole(locals.user.role)) throw error(403, 'Forbidden');
... set: { ...(color !== undefined ? { color } : {}) }
export const resolveAvatarColor = (stored, name) => stored ?? avatarColor(name);
